creator: nicholas.h.briggs@gmail.com
text:
This seems to be reproducible as an unprivileged user:

$ sleep 10
^Z
[1] + Suspended
$ ps
 PID TT  STAT    TIME COMMAND
 969  0  Ss   0:00.15 -sh (sh)
1471  0  TC   0:00.01 sleep 10
1472  0  R+   0:00.02 ps
1261  1  Is+  0:00.07 -sh (sh)
$ truss -p 1471
[system panics]
